title: stipa rosea
intro: Stipa rosea, also known as Rose Needle Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stipa rosea include reducing inflammation and relieving congestion, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Stipa rosea typically involve drying the plant's flowers and leaves to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption.
